user.title: Set up Z2M Irrigation
user.description: Click submit to add the integration. All configuration happens via the Configure button after setup.

init.title: MQTT — step {step}
init.description: Z2M base topic, manual valve names, and flow scaling.

data.manual_topics: Manual valve friendly names (one per line)
data.flow_scale: Flow scale (multiplier to convert reported flow to L/min)

weather.title: Weather sources — step {step}
weather.description: Optional weather sensors used by the irrigation calculator. All four are optional — missing values are treated as neutral defaults (no rain, average VPD).

safety.title: Safety & global thresholds — step {step}
safety.description: Configure the panic-state kill switch and global skip thresholds. The kill switch is invoked best-effort if the integration enters a panic state.

data.kill_switch_entity: Kill switch entity (turned OFF on panic)
data.global_min_run_liters: Global minimum run (L) — zones below this are skipped
